test.fill_query: INSERT INTO codec_rtn_{type}_alp_{variant} (n) SELECT round(number/20+sin(number), 3) FROM system.numbers LIMIT {num_rows} SETTINGS max_threads=1
INSERT INTO codec_rnd_{type}_alp_{variant} (n) SELECT (intHash64(number) - 4294967295)/pi() FROM system.numbers LIMIT {num_rows} SETTINGS max_threads=1
optimize table codec_{seq_type}_{type}_alp_{variant} FINAL settings optimize_throw_if_noop = 1
test.query: SELECT count(n) FROM codec_{seq_type}_{type}_alp_{variant} WHERE ignore(n) == 0 LIMIT {num_rows} SETTINGS max_threads=1
